steps.title: Rewrite the given equation
steps.content:
Divide the given equation by $3$:
$$
3x=36y-45
$$
$$
x=12y-15
$$

steps.title: Find a parallel equation
steps.content:
For no solution, the second equation must have the same slope relationship but a different constant. The equation $\frac{1}{3}x=4y$ becomes
$$
x=12y
$$

steps.title: Compare the constants
steps.content: The equations $x=12y-15$ and $x=12y$ have the same slope relationship but different constants, so the lines are parallel and distinct. The answer is B.
